problem_text_cn: 1415 一个1 MeV的电子在云室中的径迹是一串小水滴，水滴的线度约为$10^{-5}\ \mathrm{m}$。试问电子的径迹会不会与直线有明显的差别？为什么？（电子静能$m_ec^2 = 0.511\ \mathrm{MeV}$，$hc = 12400\ \mathrm{eV \cdot \AA}$）
problem_text_en: 1415 A 1 MeV electron leaves a trail of small droplets in a cloud chamber, with droplet sizes of about $10^{-5}\ \mathrm{m}$. Will the electron's trajectory deviate significantly from a straight line? Why? (Electron rest energy $m_ec^2 = 0.511\ \mathrm{MeV}$, $hc = 12400\ \mathrm{eV \cdot \AA}$)
img_cn: 图1415_1：电子径迹的角度不确定度
img_en: Fig. 1415_1: Angular uncertainty of the electron's trajectory
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】由不确定关系$\Delta p_x \approx \hbar/\Delta x$，估算横向动量不确定度，再与电子总动量$p_y$比较，得到角度不确定度$\Delta\theta \approx 2.3 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{rad}$，远小于可观测范围；同时德布罗意波长$\lambda = h/p \ll 10^{-5}\ \mathrm{m}$，电子可视为经典粒子。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Using the uncertainty principle $\Delta p_x \approx \hbar/\Delta x$, estimate the transverse momentum uncertainty, compare it with the total electron momentum $p_y$, and find the angular uncertainty $\Delta\theta \approx 2.3 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{rad}$, which is negligible. The de Broglie wavelength $\lambda = h/p \ll 10^{-5}\ \mathrm{m}$, so the electron can be treated as a classical particle.
problem_answer: 电子的径迹**不会与直线有明显差别**。因为由不确定关系得到的角度不确定度仅为$\boldsymbol{2.3 \times 10^{-8}\ \mathrm{rad}}$，且电子的德布罗意波长远小于水滴线度，可近似为经典粒子沿直线运动。
